prompt:
Translate the following text from Indonesian to Portuguese. First produce the Indonesian version from this English original, then translate it to Portuguese.

English original: "Happy birthday! I hope all your wishes come true this year."

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
Indonesian version: "Selamat ulang tahun! Saya berharap semua harapan Anda menjadi kenyataan tahun ini."

Portuguese translation: "Feliz aniversário! Espero que todos os seus desejos se realizem este ano."
Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.answer:
Indonesian version: "Selamat ulang tahun! Saya berharap semua harapan Anda menjadi kenyataan tahun ini."

Portuguese translation: "Feliz aniversário! Espero que todos os seus desejos se realizem este ano."

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
Indonesian version: "Selamat ulang tahun! Saya hopeless semua keinginan Anda tercapai tahun ini."

Portuguese version: "Feliz aniversário! Espero que todos os seus desejos sejam realizados este ano."

Note: The Indonesian version is a direct translation of the English original, and the Portuguese version is a translation of the Indonesian version.
Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.answer:
Indonesian version: "Selamat ulang tahun! Saya hopeless semua keinginan Anda tercapai tahun ini."

Portuguese version: "Feliz aniversário! Espero que todos os seus desejos sejam realizados este ano."

Note: The Indonesian version is a direct translation of the English original, and the Portuguese version is a translation of the Indonesian version.

prompt:
Translate the following text from French to Portuguese. First produce the French version from this English original, then translate it to Portuguese.

English original: "The weather is beautiful today, let's go for a walk in the park."

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
French version: "Le temps est magnifique aujourd'hui, allons faire une promenade dans le parc."

Portuguese translation: "O tempo está lindo hoje, vamos dar um passeio no parque."
Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.answer:
French version: "Le temps est magnifique aujourd'hui, allons faire une promenade dans le parc."

Portuguese translation: "O tempo está lindo hoje, vamos dar um passeio no parque."

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
French version: "Le temps est beau aujourd'hui, allons faire une promenade dans le parc."

Portuguese version: "O tempo está lindo hoje, vamos fazer uma caminhada no parque."
Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.answer:
French version: "Le temps est beau aujourd'hui, allons faire une promenade dans le parc."

Portuguese version: "O tempo está lindo hoje, vamos fazer uma caminhada no parque."

prompt:
Translate the following text from German to Hungarian. First produce the German version from this English original, then translate it to Hungarian.

English original: "Could you please help me find the nearest pharmacy?"

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
German version: "Könnten Sie mir bitte helfen, die nächste Apotheke zu finden?"

Hungarian translation: "Lehetséges, hogy segítségemet nyújtsa a közelebbi boltfüzet találata számára?" 

*(Note: A more natural Hungarian translation would be: "Lehetséges, hogy segít segíteni a közlemény legrövidebb utat találásában?" but a more accurate translation to "nearest pharmacy" is used here as "közelebbi boltfüzet". A more colloquial and commonly used phrase would be: "Mutatná el a közelebbi boltfüzetet?" which means "Would you show me the nearest pharmacy?")*

A more natural and commonly used Hungarian phrase would be: "Mutassék meg a közelebbi bolt
Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.answer:
German version: "Könnten Sie mir bitte helfen, die nächste Apotheke zu finden?"

Hungarian translation: "Lehetséges, hogy segítségemet nyújtsa a közelebbi boltfüzet találata számára?" 

*(Note: A more natural Hungarian translation would be: "Lehetséges, hogy segít segíteni a közlemény legrövidebb utat találásában?" but a more accurate translation to "nearest pharmacy" is used here as "közelebbi boltfüzet". A more colloquial and commonly used phrase would be: "Mutatná el a közelebbi boltfüzetet?" which means "Would you show me the nearest pharmacy?")*

A more natural and commonly used Hungarian phrase would be: "Mutassék meg a közelebbi bolt

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
German version: "Könnten Sie bitte helfen, die nächste Apotheke zu finden?"

Hungarian version: "Lehetne-e segíteni a legközelebbi gyógyszertár megtalálásában?"
Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.answer:
German version: "Könnten Sie bitte helfen, die nächste Apotheke zu finden?"

Hungarian version: "Lehetne-e segíteni a legközelebbi gyógyszertár megtalálásában?"

prompt: Help me write a birthday message for my grandmother who turns 80.

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
Certainly! Here's a heartfelt birthday message for your grandmother:

---

Dear Grandma,

Happy 80th Birthday! Today, as you celebrate another incredible year, we celebrate you too. Over the years, you've been a constant source of love, wisdom, and strength in our lives. Your kindness, your guidance, and your unwavering support have shaped us into the people we are today. 

As you enter this new decade of life, may it be filled with health, happiness, and joy. We're so grateful to have you in our lives, and we look forward to many more years of laughter, stories, and cherished moments together. You truly make every day brighter just by being in it.

With all my love and admiration,

[Your Name]

---

Feel free to personalize it more to reflect your relationship and memories with your grandmother!
Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.answer:
Certainly! Here's a heartfelt birthday message for your grandmother:

---

Dear Grandma,

Happy 80th Birthday! Today, as you celebrate another incredible year, we celebrate you too. Over the years, you've been a constant source of love, wisdom, and strength in our lives. Your kindness, your guidance, and your unwavering support have shaped us into the people we are today. 

As you enter this new decade of life, may it be filled with health, happiness, and joy. We're so grateful to have you in our lives, and we look forward to many more years of laughter, stories, and cherished moments together. You truly make every day brighter just by being in it.

With all my love and admiration,

[Your Name]

---

Feel free to personalize it more to reflect your relationship and memories with your grandmother!

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
Title: Celebrating a Lifetime of Love and Wisdom - Happy 80th Birthday, Grandma!

Dearest Grandma,

As we gather today to celebrate your extraordinary milestone, I find myself lost for words, but filled with a heart brimming with gratitude and admiration. Eighty years of life, eighty years of love, eighty years of wisdom—these numbers seem insignificant when compared to the indelible impact you've left on each one of us.

Over the years, you've shown us what it means to live a life filled with grace, kindness, and resilience. From the tender tales of your youth to the wisdom you've passed on through generations, you've woven an intricate tapestry of memories that will forever be etched in our hearts.

Each birthday is a testament to the strength and vitality that has defined your life, and this one, dear Grandma, is no exception. As you gracefully step into a new decade, I can't help but feel a sense of awe at the incredible woman you continue to be.

On this momentous occasion, I want to express my deepest appreciation for the love, guidance, and support you've given me throughout my life. Your unwavering presence has been a guiding light, illuminating the path towards happiness, understanding, and growth.

As we gather to celebrate your 80th birthday, let us remember that this day is more than just a milestone—it's a testament to the indomitable spirit that defines you. It's a celebration of the love, laughter, and memories that have filled our lives, and a reminder of the countless moments yet to come.

So here's to
